task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

task.label: Apply minimum standards of physical and mental fitness

conditions.condition: during the medical examination for first-time issuance

task.label: Require a medical examination

conditions.condition: in respect of applications for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

exception.description: regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: applies to the renewal of driving licences in category AM only if so required by the Member State

task.label: Require a medical examination for the renewal of driving licences
Require the applicant or holder to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence

exception.description: notwithstanding paragraphs 1 and 2, instead of requiring a medical examination

task.label: Fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: if required by Member State for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

exception.description: notwithstanding paragraphs 1 and 2, instead of requiring a medical examination

task.label: React to significant changes in physical or mental fitness

conditions.condition: after the driving licence has been issued following a medical examination or self-assessment

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures

conditions.condition: for knowingly providing false information in the self-assessment form, or for failing to meet any requirement established under paragraph 3(b)

task.label: Apply the alternative measure to allow monitoring of fitness to drive
Ensure that the applicant or holder undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more listed medical conditions

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence, if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more listed medical conditions

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve knowledge
Adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

conditions.condition: to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards

task.label: Inform the Commission about adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards

task.label: Make guidelines available to the other Member States
Develop public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Inform the Commission about public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions

task.label: Make information available to the other Member States
Set stricter standards for the issuance or renewal of driving licences
